TaoTronics 24” Space Heater 007, 1500W Fast Ceramic Heating with 3 Adjustable Heat Levels $109.99 USD

Color
  1. Home
  2. TaoTronics 24” Space Heater 007, 1500W Fast Ceramic Heating with 3 Adjustable Heat Levels

TaoTronics 24” Space Heater 007, 1500W Fast Ceramic Heating with 3 Adjustable Heat Levels

Model: TT-HE007
Sale price$109.99 USD

Hot Winter Price $65.99

CODE: Winter40

Copy Code
Copied
 Ends in
00

D

00

H

00

M

00

S
    • Heats In Just 3 Seconds: By using 1500W PTC ceramic heating technology and over 3000 RPMs, the portable space heater starts warming rooms in just 3 seconds so you’re never left feeling those winter blues
    • Professional-Level Safety Protections: Constructed with V0 flame retardant material and featuring both tip-over and overheat protections, the heater always keep your family safe in case of an accident or power surge
    • Warms With Barely A Sound: Keep a warm room at night with the silent tower heater that runs as low as 40dB so it never disturbs you when you’re working, resting or relaxing
    • Heats Every Corner: Ensure every corner is met with warm air thanks to the ultra-wide 65° oscillating fan. Now 20% wider than before, never find yourself sitting in a cool patch on cold days
    • Great Features Make Life Easy: At just 24-inches, the slim heater is operated via a remote control and includes must-have extras including a large LED display, 12-hour timer, smart temperature control, and a handle for easy portability

Color:Black

Description
Customer Reviews
Shipping & Returns

Description

Circulate Comforting Heat for Your Home

Never fear the cold again with our 24" tall tower fan heater! Well suited to project warm airflow into small rooms, with a smooth 65° oscillation it effectively delivers soothing and even heat, generating and maintaining warmth at your desired temperature to ensure you stay cozy and warm.

Featured

  • Fast heating in 3 seconds
  • 24" tall for a wider heat range
  • ECO mode for energy-saving
  • 65° oscillation for even heating
  • 41°F-95°F adjustable temperature
  • 12hr timer
  • 24hr auto-off
  • Remote control included

    • What's in the box

  • 1 x TaoTronics PTC Space Heater (Model: TT-HE007)
  • 1 x Remote Control
  • User Guide

    • Top-Mounted LED Display

    Display screen located on the top makes it simple to configure its settings; automatically turns off after two minutes as to not disturb your sleep.

    Remote Control

    Effortlessly control the heater from the comfort of your bed or sofa across the room with the convenient remote.

    Convenient Hidden Handle

    Sleek body designed with a hidden handle on the back, you can easily transport the space heater anywhere you require warmth.

    TaoTronics - Technology Enhances Life

    Shipping & Returns

    Shipping Policy

    Shipping Fee

    Free shipping on all orders.

     

    Shipping Orders

    Normally orders will ship within 2-7 business days of processing payment, unless particularly noted elsewhere on the website, at the time order is placed, or you receive an email notice that an item in your order has been delayed. Any expected delivery dates that may be given are only estimates. Orders can be delayed due to verification or the time the order has been placed. Orders may be delivered in separate shipments. All purchases through Taotronics.com are made pursuant to a shipment contract. This means that the risk of loss and title for such items pass to you upon tender of the item to the carrier.

     

    Delivery Address

    A complete and correct delivery address is essential. Once your order has been prepared for shipment or has shipped, we are unable to change the shipping address. If a package is returned to us due to an incorrect or incomplete address provided by you (the customer) or your agent, we will contact you immediately for a correction, and the package will be re-shipped at an additional shipping fee. You must include a daytime telephone number for all orders. Occasionally packages are returned to Taotronics as undeliverable. When the carrier returns an undeliverable package to Taotronics, please contact Taotronics to make arrangements for reshipment.

    The 7 continental U.S. states will not serve at this time (Last updated Nov 25, 2020. )::

    Armed Forces - Americas
    Alaska
    Guam
    Hawaii
    Northern Mariana Islands
    Puerto Rico
    U.S. Virgin Islands
    Check back as we expand to more regions. 

     

    Shipping Hubs

    Orders for The United States:
    Most Taotronics.com orders will be processed by Amazon, and shipped directly from Amazon distribution center in California.

     

    Delivery Times

    When you place an order on the Taotronics website, you will receive a shipping info email from Amazon and/or one from the website. Please check your registered email inbox for your order status. Additionally, you can check the shipping info through My Account -> Order History after you log in to our website.

     

    Standard Shipping

    Products shipped via standard service are normally delivered within 3-5 business days after receiving the order.
